narrative:
Precinct Monroe South East (precinct in Miami County) has 1,084 registered voters, with 47.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 43.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 34.4 percentage points.
